scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/api && npm run lint --prefix apps/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix apps/api && npm run lint:fix --prefix apps/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/api && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/web
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e:api && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
